title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Will Algeria give Riyad Mahrez a last hurrah in North America? All players, full squad list, key stats and schedule
original_text:
Will Algeria give Riyad Mahrez a last hurrah in North America? All players, full squad list, key stats and schedule
Quick facts
Captain: Riyad Mahrez
Manager: Vladimir Petković
World Cup appearances (including 2026): 5
Best World Cup result: Round of 16 (2014)
FIFA World Cup 2026 – Algeria’s final squad
Goalkeepers: Luca Zidane (Granada), Oussama Benbot (Alger), Melvin Mastil (Stade Nyonnais)
Defenders: Rafik Belghali (Hellas Verona), Samir Chergui (Paris FC), Rayan Aït-Nouri (Manchester City), Jaouen Hadjam (BSC Young Boys), Aïssa Mandi (Lille), Ramy Bensebaïni (Borussia Dortmund), Zinedine Belaïd (Kabylie), Mohamed Amine Tougaï (Espérance de Tunis), Achraf Abada (USM Alger)
Midfielders: Nabil Bentaleb (Lille), Hicham Boudaoui (OGC Nice), Houssem Aouar (Al-Ittihad), Farès Chaïbi (Eintracht Frankfurt), Ibrahim Maza (Bayer Leverkusen), Yacine Titraoui (Royal Charleroi), Ramiz Zerrouki (Twente)
Forwards: Mohamed Amine Amoura (VfL Wolfsburg), Nadhir Benbouali (ETO), Adil Boulbina (Al-Duhail), Farès Ghedjemis (Frosinone), Amine Gouiri (Olympique Marseilla), Anis Hadj Moussa (Feyenoord), Riyad Mahrez (Al-Ahli)
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
